document.source_title: Tehran will welcome diplomatic initiative from India: Iran Dy FM Kazem Gharibabadi

claims.claim_text: Iran will welcome and work on a diplomatic initiative from India.
claims.evidence_text: Tehran has conveyed to New Delhi that if India comes up with a 'diplomatic initiative', the Iranian government will 'welcome and work on it'.

entities.name: Kazem Gharibabadi
entities.evidence_text: Iran’s Deputy Foreign Minister Kazem Gharibabadi said on Wednesday that he has conveyed the same to MEA Secretary (West) Siby George.

entities.name: BRICS
entities.description: An international grouping of emerging economies.
entities.evidence_text: Gharibabadi, who is accompanying Iranian Foreign minister Seyed Abbas Araghchi for the two-day BRICS Foreign Ministers’ meeting starting Thursday.

events.event: Iran expresses willingness to work with India on diplomatic initiatives.
events.evidence_text: I requested India to come up with an initiative. India is a big, important country. If India comes up with an initiative, we will work on that.

citations.title: Tehran will welcome diplomatic initiative from India: Iran Dy FM Kazem Gharibabadi

source_credibility.reason: The source is a reputable news outlet with a history of reporting on international relations.
